result.stderr:
sqltoopenapi3 1.1.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Caligo s.r.l.

  -c, --connection    Required. Database connection string.

  -s, --schema        Database schema name. Required only to filter for a
                      specific schema. If not specified, the default schema
                      assigned to the DB login will be used

  -o, --output        (Default: schemas.yaml) Output file path.

  -p, --paths         paths file name. If this parameter or pathPrefix are
                      specified, the tool will generate the OpenAPI 3.0 paths to
                      access the tables.

  --pathPrefix        prefix to be added to the path, e.g. /v1/data. If this
                      parameter or pathPrefix are specified, the tool will
                      generate the OpenAPI 3.0 paths to access the tables.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
